---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "Epic: [Short description of feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees:

---

## Feature Request Process

### Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

### Use Case
Explain why this feature is needed and who would benefit from it.

### Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of how you think this feature could be implemented.

### Benefits
What benefits would this feature bring to the project?

### Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
